summary: Completed regression testing after major VesselExecutionPage split. Fixed critical bug where detail view (/documents/:tradeId) was not loading trade data due to missing urlTradeId dependency in useEffect. Also fixed backend bugs: missing timezone import and misplaced download_draft_document function decorator.

minor.issue: pir.accounts credentials may have changed - seed uses piraccount/piraccount123

passed_tests: Login flow: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials (salih.karagoz/salih123) returns token
Login redirects to /trades dashboard after successful login
Contracts page: Table loads with contract data
Vessel Execution list view (/documents): Shows Ongoing Contracts (7), Completed Contracts (1), Pending Vessel Nomination (5) tables
Vessel Execution list view: Mobile contract selector dropdown present
Vessel Execution detail view (/documents/:tradeId): Loads trade data with all 7 tabs (Nomination, DI, Drafts, B/L, Appropriation, Docs, Payment)
Vessel Execution detail view: Back button returns to list view
Draft Documents tab: Bulk upload zone present, 13 required document rows displayed
B/L tab: Bill of Lading details displayed with Edit button
Payment tab: Payment date picker and SWIFT upload present
DI tab: Documentary Instruction content loaded
Accounting page (/omega): Summary cards and 3 tabs (Incoming, Outgoing, Bank Statements)
Calendar page: Calendar with events displayed (Ramazan Bayramı visible)
Brokerage Invoices page (/commissions): Total Commission $55,228.79 displayed with filter dropdowns
Market Data page: 5 tabs (Indications, CBOT & Exchange Rates, Turkish Exchanges, Tenders, Coaster Freights)
Port Line-Ups page: Daily and Monthly tabs with port data
Settings page: Profile info and reference data tabs
Backend API: GET /api/trades returns trades list
Backend API: GET /api/trades/{id} returns trade details
Backend API: GET /api/events returns events
Backend API: GET /api/invoices returns invoices
Backend API: GET /api/config/active-url returns correct URL
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: VesselExecutionPage useEffect missing urlTradeId dependency - detail view was not loading trade data
FIXED: trades.py missing timezone import for datetime.now(timezone.utc)
FIXED: trades.py download_draft_document function was not properly decorated (decorator separated from function)

accountant.note: pir.accounts exists but password may have changed

context_for_next_testing_agent: VesselExecutionPage now has split routing: /documents shows list view with 3 tables (Ongoing, Completed, Pending), /documents/:tradeId shows detail view with 7 tabs. The useEffect dependency was fixed to include urlTradeId. All major pages tested and working. Backend trades.py had timezone import and decorator issues that were fixed.

bugs_fixed.issue: useEffect had empty dependency array [], causing detail view to not load trade data when navigating from list

bugs_fixed.fix: Added timezone to import: from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

bugs_fixed.issue: download_draft_document function decorator was separated from function definition
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved function definition directly after @router.get decorator
